outputs.name: There are no outputs for this script.
Requires an instance of one of the available email integrations, set to fetch incidents.

In case that the incident in which the automation script is running, has limited permissions to (e.g. has a certain role assigned to it), then the responder to the email need to have the relevant permissions assigned to its user in Cortex XSOAR.

outputs.description: will not work when run in the playbook debugger. This is because the debugger does not generate entitlements, since they must be tied to an investigation. Entitlements are needed to track the response. Whitespaces are not supported in custom options and will not work. (i.e. setting a button to I Agree
